Hero.label: STRATEGIC LOGISTICS PARTNER AT TA LUNG INTERNATIONAL BORDER GATE
Hero.title:
CONNECTING BORDERS
REACHING THE WORLD
Hero.subtitle: Since 2008, Ta Lung Quang Minh has proudly delivered safe, fast, and cost-optimized customs clearance, warehousing, and multimodal transport solutions.

AboutPage.heroSubtitle: Over a decade of building seamless supply chains at Ta Lung International Border Gate

intro.title: COMPANY OVERVIEW
intro.content:
Established in 2008 as Ta Lung Quang Minh Trading & Transport Co., Ltd., Ta Lung Quang Minh Joint Stock Company has rapidly grown into a leading force in border logistics. Leveraging the Vietnam–China trade flow through Ta Lung International Border Gate, we have heavily invested in internationally standardized warehouse systems and cargo consolidation hubs.

Our service ecosystem is comprehensive: Warehousing, Truck Yards, Customs Brokerage, and Multimodal International Transport.

AboutPage.missionText: Our mission is to eliminate clearance barriers and optimize supply chains through transparency and speed. Our strategic vision is to become a key link in the Vietnam–China economic corridor.

timeline.stage1_text: Founded Ta Lung Quang Minh Trading & Transport Co., Ltd., laying the foundation for cross-border transport services.
timeline.stage2_text: Converted into a Joint Stock Company, expanded infrastructure to 25 hectares, and established new clearance standards.
timeline.stage3_text: Completing integration of Ta Lung – Chi Ma border system, building a logistics service chain along the border.

facilities.warehouseContent: Owning 3 strategic yards: Ta Lung Quang Minh, Vu Thanh, and Son Cang, with a total area of 25 hectares. The infrastructure is fully integrated, meeting the strictest standards for storage and heavy cargo transloading.
facilities.transportContent: Operating a powerful fleet with various load capacities, ready to flexibly and safely meet all multimodal transport needs.

1.title: Reception & Evaluation
1.desc: Receive plans, documents, and provide optimal solutions

2.title: Customs Declaration
2.desc: Handle legal procedures and fast-track clearance

3.title: Vehicle Coordination
3.desc: Route and dispatch vehicles to dedicated transfer zones

4.title: Safe Transloading
4.desc: Handle cargo with professional teams and equipment

5.title: Completion & Delivery
5.desc: Finalize procedures and monitor final delivery stage

vision.title: FUTURE DIRECTION
vision.content:
Ta Lung Quang Minh is undergoing strong transformation, focusing on digitalizing processes and upgrading logistics infrastructure.

Our ambition goes beyond Ta Lung. The long-term goal is to seamlessly connect business operations across Ta Lung and Chi Ma border systems, forming a continuous border logistics service chain, reinforcing our role as a key trade gateway between Vietnam and China.

offices.title: BRANCH NETWORK
offices.halong: No. 29 Le Duan, Bai Chay Ward, Ha Long City, Quang Ninh
offices.caobang: Ta Lung International Border Gate Area, Phuc Hoa, Cao Bang Province

LatestNews.title: News & Events
LatestNews.seoContent:
Welcome to the news section of <bold>Ta Lung Logistics</bold>. Here, we provide the latest updates on internal news, import-export policies, new regulations at <bold>Ta Lung International Border Gate</bold>, and global transport trends.

Staying updated with customs procedures and border clearance conditions is crucial to avoid shipment delays. Our experts continuously analyze and deliver valuable insights for our clients.
LatestNews.noNewsInCategory: No articles available in this category.
LatestNews.ctaDescription: Contact us now for professional consultation from Ta Lung Logistics.

ServicesPage.title: Logistics Services System
ServicesPage.description: Comprehensive supply chain solutions at Ta Lung International Border Gate, connecting Vietnam and China trade.
ServicesPage.noServices: No services available at the moment.
ServicesPage.seoTitle: Service capabilities at Ta Lung Logistics
ServicesPage.seoContent:
Ta Lung Logistics (Ta Lung Quang Minh) is proud to be a pioneer with over 15 years of experience at <bold>Ta Lung International Border Gate</bold>. We provide not only standalone services but also complete solutions from <bold>warehousing</bold>, <bold>customs brokerage</bold> to <bold>multimodal transport</bold>.

With 3 transshipment yards totaling 25 hectares, we are capable of handling oversized cargo, perishable goods, and large-scale shipments. Our expert team ensures cost and time optimization for businesses.
ServicesPage.ctaTitle: Ready to optimize your supply chain?

ServiceDetail.ctaDesc: Contact Ta Lung Logistics team for optimal consultation and pricing.

WhyChooseUs.title: Your Guarantee of Success
WhyChooseUs.point1Text: 25-hectare yard equipped with modern handling equipment at a prime trade hub.
WhyChooseUs.point2Text: Expert team with deep knowledge of border policies, handling situations 24/7.
WhyChooseUs.point3Text: Committed to minimizing storage time with clear procedures and transparent costs.

Partners.title: Trusted by hundreds of import-export businesses

ContactPage.title: Get in Touch
ContactPage.description: Our team is always ready to listen and solve your supply chain challenges. Contact us today.

faq.q1: What is the average customs clearance time?
faq.a1: With complete documentation, the average clearance time is under 2 working hours.
faq.q2: Do you support special cargo transloading?
faq.a2: Yes. With diverse equipment and large facilities, we handle all types of cargo safely.
faq.q3: Do you offer rail or water transport?
faq.a3: Yes. We provide flexible multimodal transport solutions combining road, rail, and water.
